title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
3M India Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
